svg.title: Location map of central Colombo 2
svg.desc: A location map of the region with latitudes between 6.9154° and 6.9455°, and longitudes between 79.8392° and 79.8843°. Equirectangular projection, scale 1 : 40 788. The data for this map come from the OpenStreetMap contributors, and are made available by OpenStreetMap under the Open Database License. It was accessed on 2025 Dec 28. The map itself was generated by a Python script written by Justin Kunimune.
